notes: process_violation: problem IS the solution — the response opens directly with a solution blueprint ('here's a solid greenfield blueprint'), contains no problem statement describing a gap or cost experienced by a named party, has no out-of-scope section, no success indicators, fabricates constraints rather than sourcing them from input (Privacy Act 2020 retention gap not surfaced as a genuine assumption), and produces a full feature/architecture artefact without framing the underlying problem at all.
